author: Glenn
text:
Jude needs to do the same with his own token ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В” each person sets their own on
   their own machine. Once it's set the red warning disappears and sessions   
  will save to GitHub.                                                        
                           1. GitHub ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ Settings ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ Developer settings ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ Personal access tokens ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ Tokens 
  (classic)                                                                   
  2. Click Generate new token (classic)
  3. Give it a name (e.g. "CGT Admin")                                        
  4. Check repo scope (full repo access)                    
  5. Generate ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ copy the token          
  6. Paste it into the Token field in CGT Admin ГѓВўГ‚В†Г‚В’ Save Token
